items.title: Tarana - Thaat Ensemble
items.description:
Tarana performed by the Thaat ensemble during Thaat Nrityanjali 2025, held at the Alliance Francaise Bangalore.

Performers - Shohini Ghosh, Jaya Srinivasan, Puvaneshwari, Garima Gola, Sayantan Sengupta

items.title: Teentaal - Thaat Ensemble
items.description:
Teentaal performed by students of Thaat Kathak Academy at Thaat Nrityanjali 2025 at Alliance Francaise Bangalore.

Dancers - Eshanya, Shreya Mechri, Srigouri Mechri
Music - Bhageshree Vaze
Choreography - Smitha Srinivasan
